name: KFC Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the chicken with a mixture of water and salt. Chill in a bowl for at least 1 hour.
2. Whirl herbs, onion powder, seasoned salt, instant chicken broth, and pepper in a blender.
3. Combine the herb blend with the flour mixture while still wet until thoroughly coated.
4. Melt enough shortening or salad oil to create a 1-inch deep layer in a large skillet.
5. Heat the skillet to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Fry the chicken pieces, turning once, for 5 minutes on each side.
7. Lift the chicken from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
8. When the pieces are fried, drain the fat from the skillet.
9. Add one cup of chicken broth to the skillet, then add the chicken pieces.
10. Cover the skillet and cook until fork-tender, for 15 minutes or longer.
This recipe is entitled "Marie Walsh's Kentucky Fried Chicken". I copied it out of a magazine several years ago and have used it often. WALLACE LELAND (wrv)
